title: poa nemoralis subsp. balbisii
intro: Poa nemoralis subsp. balbisii, also known as Balbis' meadow-grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis subsp. balbisii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
